description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a spacious driveway leading to a double garage at the front. The structure is surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with several large trees and a grassy lawn. The roof is primarily flat with some sections covered by terracotta tiles, and the exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color. The backyard includes a green area and what appears to be a patio or pergola with seating arrangements. Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern, and the main entryway is marked by a covered porch with a tiled roof. The overall design is modern with Mediterranean influences, emphasizing open outdoor spaces and functional living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat and tiled roof, double garage, landscaped yard, and a covered entry porch. The exterior features light walls, symmetrical windows, and Mediterranean-style details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entry porch, and three large trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the backyard lawn, and the patio/pergola area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, and the back fence with visible windows and doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and the side lawn, with the entry porch partially visible.
attribute_roof_type: flat with partial gable tile sections
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with tiled roof, single main door, and paved steps leading from the driveway
